mapper.select: Select a.id, -- 주문_ID a.order_number, -- 주문번호 a.ordered_at, -- 주문일시 ( Select x.name From channels x Where 1 = 1 And x.id = a.channel_id ) channel_name, -- 채널명 a.status, -- 주문상태 a.customer_name, -- 주문자 a.customer_phone, -- 주문자 연락처 a.customer_email, -- 주문자이메일 a.company_name, -- 회사명 a.payment_status, -- 결제상태 a.final_price, -- 결제금액 a.point_amount, -- 포인트결제금액 CASE WHEN a.point_amount IS NOT NULL AND a.point_amount > 0 THEN a.payment_method::text || ', POINT' ELSE a.payment_method::text END AS payment_method, -- 결제수단 a.paid_at, -- 결제일시 a.total_price, -- 상품총금액 a.memo -- 요청사항 FROM orders a Where 1 = 1 And a.ORDER_NUMBER = #{orderNumber}

Select a.id, -- 주문상품_ID a.product_id AS productId, -- 상품ID ch.name AS channelName, --채널명 a.product_name AS productName, -- 상품명 ( Select x.name From menu_categories x Join Products y On x.id = y.category_id where 1 = 1 And y.id = a.product_id ) AS categoryName, -- 카테고리명 d.name AS partnerName, -- 파트너명 STRING_AGG(e.option_value, ' ' ORDER BY e.id) AS optionName, -- 옵션명 a.quantity, a.unit_price AS unitPrice, a.total_price AS totalPrice FROM order_items a JOIN orders b ON b.id = a.order_id LEFT JOIN channels ch ON ch.id = b.channel_id LEFT JOIN products c ON c.id = a.product_id LEFT JOIN partners d ON d.id = c.partner_id LEFT JOIN order_item_options e ON e.order_item_id = a.id Where 1 = 1 And a.order_id = #{id} GROUP BY a.id, a.product_id, a.product_name, ch.name, d.name, a.quantity, a.unit_price, a.total_price

Insert Into ORDERS ( ORDER_NUMBER, CHANNEL_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_PHONE, RECIPIENT_NAME, RECIPIENT_PHONE, CUSTOMER_EMAIL, COMPANY_NAME, MEMO, TOTAL_PRICE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, FINAL_PRICE, STATUS, PAYMENT_METHOD, PAYMENT_STATUS, BENEPIA_ID ) Values ( 'W'|| TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || NEXTVAL('seq_order_number'), #{channelId}, #{customerName}, REGEXP_REPLACE(#{customerPhone}, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), #{recipientName}, REGEXP_REPLACE(#{recipientPhone}, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), #{customerEmail}, #{companyName}, #{memo}, #{totalPrice}, #{discountPrice}, 0, 'PENDING_PAYMENT', #{paymentMethod}::payment_method, 'READY', #{benepiaId} ) RETURNING id, order_number

Insert Into ORDER_ITEMS ( ORDER_ID, PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, QUANTITY, UNIT_PRICE, TOTAL_PRICE, PARTNER_ID ) Values ( #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalPrice}, #{partnerId} ) RETURNING id
mapper.insert: Insert Into ORDER_ITEM_OPTIONS ( ORDER_ITEM_ID, OPTION_NAME, OPTION_VALUE, OPTION_VALUE_ID, ADDITIONAL_PRICE ) Values ( #{orderItemId}, #{optionName}, #{optionValueName}, #{optionValueId}, #{additionalPrice} )
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET pg_provider = #{pgProvider}, pg_tid = #{pgTid}, pg_online_url = #{pgOnlineUrl}, pg_mobile_url = #{pgMobileUrl}, payment_status = 'REQUESTED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT product_name FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId}::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS first_product_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId}::uuid) AS item_count
mapper.update:
UPDATE orders SET paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, pg_provider = 'PAYLETTER', pg_tid = #{tid}, pg_approval_no = #{cid}, pg_callback_payload = CAST(#{payloadJson} AS jsonb), pg_callback_received_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{orderId}::uuid
AND payment_status <> 'PAID'::payment_status

UPDATE orders SET payment_status = 'FAILED'::payment_status, payment_fail_reason = #{failReason}, pg_callback_payload = CAST(#{payloadJson} AS jsonb), pg_callback_received_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{orderId}::uuid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_tickets ( order_item_id, ticket_number, ticket_used ) VALUES ( #{orderItemId}, #{ticketNumber}, false )
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET point_tid = #{pgTid}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber}
UPDATE orders SET payment_status = 'FAILED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber}
mapper.select:
SELECT oi.partner_id AS partnerId, oi.product_name AS productName, oio.option_value AS optionName, o.customer_name AS customerName, oi.quantity AS quantity,
TO_CHAR(oi.created_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS issuedAt,
CASE WHEN p.usage_period LIKE '%구매로부터%' THEN TO_CHAR(oi.created_at + INTERVAL '60 days','YYYY-MM-DD')
WHEN p.usage_period ~ '\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}~\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}' THEN split_part(p.usage_period,'~',2)
ELSE p.usage_period END AS expireDate,
oio.option_value AS optionName, (SELECT tel FROM site_info LIMIT 1) AS customerCenterPhone
FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id LEFT JOIN order_item_options oio ON oio.order_item_id = oi.id
WHERE o.order_number = #{orderNumber} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET deposit_deadline = #{deadline}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT order_number FROM orders WHERE payment_status = 'READY' AND status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND payment_method = 'VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT' AND deposit_deadline IS NOT NULL
AND deposit_deadline < NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET payment_status = 'CANCELING', updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber} AND payment_status = 'READY' AND status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT'
UPDATE orders SET payment_status = 'FAILED', status = 'CANCELED', canceled_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber} AND payment_status = 'CANCELING'
UPDATE orders SET payment_status = 'READY', updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber} AND payment_status = 'CANCELING'
